conflict: infiltrating a high-security Ostanian state dinner to identify an unknown operative
consequence: The target is revealed as Damian Desmond — running a counter-operation against his own government's extremists. Anya holds total asymmetric knowledge. The childhood recognition is a ticking clock.

The revelation: Damian Desmond, not building the conspiracy but dismantling it
Damian's unguarded thoughts carrying childhood memories of Anya — he almost forms her name but doesn't
